questions.question: A coffee shop mixes $2$ bags of Arabica beans with $3$ bags of Robusta beans. What is the ratio of Arabica to total beans?
A fruit juice is $15\%$ orange and $30\%$ apple. What is the ratio of orange to apple juice?
A solution of $20\%$ saltwater is mixed with $10$ liters of a $5\%$ saltwater solution. What is the concentration of the resulting mixture?
A chemist mixes $500$ml of a $20\%$ acid solution with $300$ml of a $50\%$ acid solution. What is the concentration of the resulting mixture?
A bakery mixes $200$g of $50\%$ sugar dough with $150$g of $20\%$ sugar dough. What percentage of the resulting mixture is sugar?
A car travels $250$ miles in $5$ hours. How many miles does it travel per hour?
A cyclist rides $30$ miles in $2$ hours. If he rides at a constant rate, how many miles will he ride in $5$ hours?
A group of friends want to split a bill evenly. If the total bill is $\$$120$ and there are $8$ friends, how much will each friend pay?

A company produces a mixture of two chemicals, A and B. If $20\%$ of the mixture is chemical A and $30\%$ is chemical B, what percentage of the mixture is neither A nor B? Show your work and explain your reasoning.

A coffee shop offers a discount on coffee beans. If a $2$-pound bag of coffee beans normally costs $\$$15$, but is on sale for $10\%$ off, how much will you pay for $3$ bags of coffee beans? Show your work and explain your reasoning.

teacher_rules: Always read the question carefully before answering
Use the given information to solve the problem
Check your work and explain your reasoning
